g.text: This is a budgeting view of VRAM residency, not a physical execution layout inside on-chip or registers
Resident allocations visible at the VRAM level
what serving can spend on KV cache
peak temporary workspace for the current pass
resident after loading until the model is
These allocations remain resident in VRAM
between requests and across forward passes
Serving engines can only use the free VRAM left
after weights and peak activation workspace
Less free VRAM -> fewer concurrent requests
